title: viola oblonga
intro: Viola oblonga, also known as the Heartsease or Common Pansy, is a species of flowering plant in the violet family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola oblonga include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Viola oblonga can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment for its medicinal uses, and it is also used as a food ingredient in some recipes.
